case_title: GAMMA OPPORTUNITY CAPITAL PARTNERS LP VS. TECHNOCONCEPTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: INTEREST ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAMMA OPPORTUNITY CAPITAL PARTNERS LP
